title: University of Southampton Delhi: Rankings, Approval, and Global Vision
text:
We are the first university to receive approval by the University Grants Commission (UGC) to set up a campus in India under National Education Policy (NEP) 2020. We are the only global top 100 university with a campus in India and a UK Russell Group – research intensive - university. We are opening our doors to students in August 2025.

Ranked top 100 in the world
Source: QS World University Rankings 2025
Global 'Top 110' best university for employability
Source: QS Graduate Employability Rankings 2022
UK's #15 university for graduate prospects
Source: Times and Sunday Times Good University Guide 2025

Supporting internationalisation in India
University of Southampton Delhi is the only Foreign Higher Educational Institution with a full licence approved by University Grants Commission (UGC) to run a campus in India. We are proud to be involved in a new chapter of internationalisation, as envisioned in the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, helping to underpin momentum for “internationalisation at home” by promoting India as a global study destination.
summary: University of Southampton Delhi is India's first UGC-approved, top 100 global university, opening in August 2025. As a UK Russell Group institution, it supports internationalisation in India under NEP 2020.
entities: Times and Sunday Times Good University Guide 2025

title: Prospective Student FAQs: Meetings, Start Dates, and Application Advice
text:
You might also want to know
How can I meet your team?
You can meet us online, and in a selection of major cities in India. You can see when and where, by visiting the Events area of our website. When event tickets are available, you will be able to book a physical event, or to register for an on online session, from the event page. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page.

When will the next academic year start?
You can see the most up to date information about start dates on our page showing key information.

Should I wait to make my application to study?
We encourage students to make their application to study at University of Southampton Delhi as soon as they can. This means we can issue an early Conditional Offer and that students will have the best the chance to meet their offer conditions. If demand is high, we may choose to close applications earlier than mentioned, but students with Offers to study would receive preferential treatment.
summary: Prospective students can meet the University of Southampton Delhi team online or at events, find academic year start dates, and should apply early for conditional offers and preferential treatment.
